testimonials.text: Thanks to this project, our village finally has reliable access to drinking water. It has changed our daily lives remarkably.
testimonials.author: Ahmed B., Zagora

testimonials.text: The academic support given to the children is truly inspiring. Their progress and motivation are visible every day.
testimonials.author: Fatima Z., Ouarzazate

testimonials.text: An exemplary initiative that meets real needs in the field. The association's commitment is admirable.
testimonials.author: Youssef M., Errachidia

testimonials.text: The actions taken have a concrete impact on the lives of families. It is serious and deeply human work.
testimonials.author: Khadija L., Tinghir

events.description: A vibrant celebration of Berber heritage, music and traditions in the heart of the High Atlas.
Tree planting, wadi cleanup and youth awareness on local climate issues.
Hands-on workshop for local farmers on irrigation and composting techniques.
Annual gala bringing together partners and donors to fund our community projects.

workProcess.title: OUR PROJECT LIFECYCLE
workProcess.step1: Listening to community needs on the ground
workProcess.step3: Ensuring project success through our team's commitment
